free_text: The Be-9(d,n)B-10 reaction as intense neutron source
Neutrons were registered with NE213 liquid
scintillators of 10 cm diameter with thicknesses of
7.5 or 10 cm; they were coupled to Millard XP2040
Three 10 cm thick NE213 neutron detectors were used.
No source of uncertainties for the graphic
Three 10 cm thick NE213 neutron detectors were used.
No source of uncertainties for the graphic
Original data were presented in keV*micro-Curie*msr
The neutron detectors were positioned 6.2 cm from the
Be-9 target centered in the BONCO at various scattering
Be-9 target of 65.5 mg/cm2 thickness was  used.
